result.stdout:
Description:
  Count, encode, decode, and explore BPE tokens — powered by the fastest .NET tokenizer.

Usage:
  ttok [<paths>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <paths>  Files or directories to count tokens for. Reads from stdin if omitted.

Options:
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  --version              Show version information
  -m, --model            Model name for tokenizer selection. [default: gpt-4o]
  -e, --encoding         Encoding name (e.g. cl100k_base, o200k_base). Overrides --model.
  --encode               Output token IDs instead of count.
  --decode               Decode token IDs from input back to text.
  --explore              Show token boundaries with | delimiters.
  -t, --truncate         Truncate input to N tokens and output the result.
  --include              Include only files matching these patterns (e.g. *.cs).
  --exclude              Exclude files matching these patterns (e.g. **/bin/**).
  --max-file-size        Skip files larger than this size (e.g. 10mb, 500kb). [default: 50mb]
  -f, --format           Output format: table or json. [default: table]
  --max-tokens           Exit with code 2 if total tokens exceed this limit.
  --context-check        Show token count as percentage of model's context window.
  --sort                 Sort results: tokens (largest first) or name.
  --group-by             Group results by: ext.
  --top                  Show only the top N files by token count.
  --no-default-excludes  Disable default directory exclusions (bin, obj, node_modules, etc.).
  --no-gitignore         Disable .gitignore processing (include all non-binary files).
  --follow-symlinks      Follow symbolic link directories (skipped by default to avoid loops).
  -q, --quiet            Suppress the summary footer (separator + total line).
  --progress             Show progress to stderr during directory scans.
  --stats                Show scan statistics (files examined, skipped, timing) to stderr.
